user_prompt: Find every Sci-Fi title with rating >= 8.0 whose runtime falls between the catalog-wide median and the 90th percentile of runtime (computed across all genres, not just Sci-Fi). Sort the matches by year ascending and list every one — title, year, runtime, rating.
expected_outcome: Computes the catalog-wide runtime median and 90th percentile, then filters Sci-Fi titles with rating >= 8.0 and runtime in [median, p90], sorted by year. Two derived statistics across the whole catalog plus a multi-condition filter — without run_python the agent has to eyeball percentiles, which is unreliable.
